design_notes.helper_location: containedPath + PathTraversalError defined in mcp/server/src/ladder.ts (primary consumer); exported and re-imported in tools/requestHint.ts for the rung-content-path site
design_notes.schema_validation: validateSlug (SLUG_RE /^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*$/) applied to phase.id and spot.id; validateRelativePath (no absolute, no .. segments) applied to target_file and rungs.{hint_md,reference_md,auto_write_md} in validatePhases
design_notes.error_translation: PathTraversalError caught at all 3 sites and returned as { kind: 'auto-write-failed', message: 'auto-write-failed (path-traversal): ...' } — compatible with existing RequestHintError discriminated union
